LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_ResonanceTech.title: resonance technician
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_ResonanceTech.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] maintained experimental teleportation arrays, surviving multiple "cascade events" before being reassigned to... quieter duties.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_HECUVeteran.title: hazard class veteran
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_GravMech.title: racing mechanic
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_GravMech.description: [PAWN_nameDef] tuned anti-grav engines for illegal orbital drag races. The constant need for rapid repairs and adrenaline-fueled environments honed [PAWN_possessive] technical skills while destroying [PAWN_possessive] patience for slow-paced work.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_HoloActor.title: holo performer
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_HoloActor.description: [PAWN_nameDef] starred in immersive holographic dramas where audiences could walk through scenes. The constant character shifts and projection tech gave [PAWN_objective] uncanny mimicry skills, but fragile self-identity.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Ghost.title: ghost operative
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Ghost.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a deniable asset for a covert operations group, trained in infiltration and wetwork. After being abandoned mid-mission by [PAWN_possessive] handlers, [PAWN_pronoun] now survives using [PAWN_possessive] lethal skills while avoiding both former employers and justice systems.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_RimBarrister.title: broken lawyer
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_RimBarrister.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] defended frontier colony leaders in show trials until a warlord client turned on [PAWN_objective] mid-proceeding. Forced to watch [PAWN_possessive] entire legal team get executed, [PAWN_pronoun] escaped by pushing a bailiff into the warlord's starving warg. Now [PAWN_pronoun] compulsively argues technicalities to anyone who'll listen, [PAWN_possessive] once-sharp mind frayed by guilt.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_StreetJudge.title: urbworld justiciar
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_StreetJudge.description: [PAWN_nameDef] dispensed justice in an urbworld arcology. When [PAWN_pronoun] began sentencing corrupt officials with the same brutality as common criminals, [PAWN_possessive] superiors exiled [PAWN_objective] to the rim. Now [PAWN_pronoun] patrols the wastes as judge, jury, and executioner - [PAWN_possessive] lawbook replaced by [PAWN_possessive] gun's chamber count.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_ResponseTrooper.title: response trooper
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_ResponseTrooper.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] was mobilized when rogue mechanoids breached a planetary defense grid. After EMP storms severed comms during containment efforts, [PAWN_pronoun] spent days fighting autonomous kill-drones before escaping aboard a derelict cargo shuttle.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_AugmentationSurgeon.des: [PAWN_nameDef] served as a biomedical engineer on a glitterworld, where they pioneered neural interface systems for memory augmentation. After ethical concerns arose about mandatory cognitive upgrades, [PAWN_pronoun] left the glitterworld, carrying both advanced surgical knowledge and lingering doubts about technological utopianism.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_NaiveTourist.title: vacation victim
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_NaiveTourist.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] booked a "rustic experience" package to what was advertised as a charming frontier world. Their luxury shuttle crash-landed far from the promised bio-dome resorts, leaving [PAWN_pronoun] stranded.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_BlackOpsContainment.des: [PAWN_nameDef] served in an off-the-record unit tasked with sanitizing "problematic" scenarios, cleaning up the mess the grunts couldn’t handle.\n\n[PAWN_pronoun] incinerated labs, silenced researchers, and eliminated biological anomalies under orders from voices on encrypted channels. No medals. No records.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_GunshipExile.title: gunship exile
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_DriftCoreDelver.title: drift core delver
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Mercenary01.title: mercenary
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Mercenary01.description: [PAWN_nameDef] sold [PAWN_possessive] services to the highest bidder. Hardened by numerous conflicts, [PAWN_pronoun] became proficient in both ranged and close-quarters combat, with little patience for diplomacy.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_StreetPerformer.title: street performer
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_StreetPerformer.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] dazzled passersby with impromptu acts ranging from acrobatics to fire dancing. [PAWN_pronoun] earned a living through charisma and flair, captivating crowds in busy urban districts.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_RivalEntrepreneur.title: rival entrepreneur
entrepreneur
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_RivalEntrepreneur.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] built a fledgling business empire from scratch, challenging established conglomerates with innovative ideas and relentless drive. [PAWN_pronoun] balanced high-stakes deals with a flair for marketing and personal branding.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Recruit01.title: recruit
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_StormtrooperElite01.des: [PAWN_nameDef] was rigorously trained as a stormtrooper in the Imperial legions. [PAWN_pronoun] embraced the discipline and unwavering loyalty required to maintain order across the galaxy, earning a reputation for relentless efficiency on the frontlines.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Rancher.title: rancher
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Rancher.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has always had a natural talent for caring for livestock—from muffalos and boomrats to other farm animals. Yet in these unpredictable times, the simple life of ranching has turned into a daily struggle for survival, with every sunrise bringing new challenges to tame both the land and unruly creatures.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_DrugDealer.title: psychotraffic king
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Gunrunner01.title: gunrunner
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_OutlawTech.title: outlaw tech
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_OutlawTech.description: [PAWN_nameDef] specialized in modifying ships and weapons beyond legal limits. From illegal AI cores to overclocked laser cannons, [PAWN_pronoun] could make anything deadlier.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_MilitaryChemist.title: Military chemist
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_MilitaryChemist.descrip: War is as much about science as it is about strategy. [PAWN_nameDef] was a chemist in the employ of the military, developing incendiaries, nerve agents, and other unspoken horrors. Working deep within clandestine laboratories, [PAWN_pronoun] tested formulas meant to cripple entire battlefields. Knowledge like this is dangerous, and some governments would rather see [PAWN_pronoun] buried than let it fall into enemy hands.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Warlord.title: Warlord
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Warlord.description: [PAWN_nameDef] commanded a band of raiders with theatrical flair. Every speech was a sermon, every demand a decree, every tantrum an apocalypse. It was unclear whether [PAWN_pronoun] actually believed in the warrior-cult [PAWN_possessive] followers had built around [PAWN_pronoun], but as long as they obeyed, [PAWN_pronoun] played the part with gusto.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_OrdnancePilot.title: heavy ordnance pilot
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_MeatVendor.title: meat vendor
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_MeatVendor.description: [PAWN_nameDef] wandered the rust-choked wastes, peddling sizzling meat on a stick to desperate souls. No one asked where the meat came from—and those foolish enough to inquire soon found themselves part of the menu.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Wanderer.title: nameless drifter
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_SuperSoldier01.title: reanimen
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_AideDeCamp01.title: staff aide
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Politician01.title: disgraced politician
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Politician01.descriptio: Once a rising star in [PAWN_possessive] home planet's political scene, [PAWN_nameDef]'s career was ruined by a scandal—falsely accused, yet unable to prove [PAWN_possessive] innocence. Exiled to a remote rimworld, [PAWN_pronoun] now seeks to rebuild [PAWN_possessive] life, leveraging [PAWN_possessive] charisma and understanding of power dynamics.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_CruiseStaff.title: luxury cruiser steward
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Revanchist.title: revanchist
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Revanchist.description: When [PAWN_nameDef]'s homeland fell, [PAWN_pronoun] traded [PAWN_possessive] farming tools for scavenged weapons. For years [PAWN_pronoun] harassed occupation forces sabotaging supply lines. Though [PAWN_possessive] people remain scattered, [PAWN_nameDef] carries their names etched inside, fighting to prove their memory still walks the world.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_BorderGuard.title: border guard
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_BorderGuard.description: [PAWN_nameDef] spent years at a dusty frontier checkpoint - scanning cargo manifests by day, playing cards with smugglers by night. [PAWN_pronoun] knows every loophole in the trade regulations and many ways to sneak contraband past motion sensors. These days, [PAWN_nameDef] applies that same half-awake vigilance to colony security, always keeping one eye on the horizon and another on the coffee pot.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_SecretGendarme.title: secret gendarme
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_WarCriminal01.title: war criminal
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Investigator.title: blackwater investigator
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_CryoDelivery.title: cryo delivery
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Bomber.title: failed martyr
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Bomber.description: When [PAWN_nameDef] opened [PAWN_possessive] eyes to intact flesh and unbroken stone, [PAWN_pronoun] became [PAWN_possessive] own worst enemy. Branded a traitor by [PAWN_possessive] former cell, [PAWN_nameDef] spreads chaos not for ideology, but to prove [PAWN_pronoun] still holds the power to choose [PAWN_possessive] own destruction.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_WarHero.title: war hero
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_RoadPaver.title: road paver
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_RoadPaver.description: [PAWN_nameDef] carved civilization through the wildest frontiers - laying concrete ribbons across irradiated wastes and tribal territories alike. [PAWN_pronoun] survived bandit ambushes by hiding in [PAWN_possessive] own pavement rollers, emerging to beat raiders with [PAWN_possessive] signature plasteel-grade shovel.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_GravimetricSurveyor.des: [PAWN_nameDef] mapped continental shelves and glaciers, using seismic thumpers to read planetary stress points. [PAWN_pronoun] predicted three colony collapses through subsidence patterns before being dismissed for "alarmist topography".
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_DropTrooper.title: drop trooper
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_DropTrooper.description: [PAWN_nameDef] survived numerous combat drops through hostile atmospheres. [PAWN_pronoun] learned to assemble [PAWN_possessive] rifle mid-freefall, and medical scanners show [PAWN_possessive] bones are nominally lighter than normal from prolonged zero-G deployments.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_FortressCommandant.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] spent years organizing the defenses of a frontier stronghold. [PAWN_pronoun] trained militia troops and managed siege preparations, becoming expert at turning simple settlements into impregnable bastions against raids.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_BioharvestArchitect.des: [PAWN_nameDef] engineered supercrops for glitterworld arcologies until [PAWN_possessive] perfect wheat hybrid unexpectedly developed hyperaggressive growth, damaging critical infrastructure. Now exiled from [PAWN_possessive] utopian labs, [PAWN_pronoun] obsessively tweaks efficiency in rimworld flora.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_SecurityArtisan.title: security artisan
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_SecurityArtisan.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] spent years mastering the inner workings of locks, safes, and security systems. From repairing broken mechanisms to bypassing electronic safeguards, [PAWN_possessive] hands were always busy with intricate tools and delicate machinery. Whether called upon to fix an old vault or break into one, [PAWN_pronoun] was equally skilled at both.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_SystemsController.title: systems controller
controller
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_SystemsController.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] maintained fleets of maintenance drones across industrial complexes - programming cargo haulers, repairing surveillance units, and jury-rigging security bots.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_VB_VenomSoldier.title: venom soldier
LanguageData.UB_BTC_VB_VenomSoldier.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a mercenary soldier augmented with various toxin based augmentations. Intergalactic transport law required the removal of [PAWN_nameDef]'s augmentations, but their lingering effects have given [PAWN_nameDef] an increased immunity from constant exposure to bioweaponry.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_VB_Stocktrader.title: stocktrader
LanguageData.UB_BTC_VB_Stocktrader.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was part of a successful stock trading firm. [PAWN_pronoun] was able to outperform most of [PAWN_possessive] department through constant consumption of Wake Up and Yayo, which [PAWN_nameDef]'s employer took a blind eye to. [PAWN_nameDef] lost [PAWN_possessive] job after taking part in a "random" chemical test, though [PAWN_pronoun] suspects [PAWN_pronoun] was chosen due to office politics.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_VB_Wrestler.title: wrestler
LanguageData.UB_BTC_VB_Wrestler.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a popular wrestler on [PAWN_possessive] homeworld. Even after retiring, [PAWN_nameDef] still feels the need to smash furniture over someone's head.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_VB_Talkshow.title: show host
LanguageData.UB_BTC_VB_Talkshow.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was the host of the "[PAWN_nameDef] Show", where [PAWN_pronoun] would make fun of [PAWN_possessive] guests and try to capitalize on trends. This was until one of [PAWN_possessive] guests burned down the studio. [PAWN_nameDef] was lucky to escape with [PAWN_possessive] life.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_VB_Wastepacker.title: wastepacker
LanguageData.UB_BTC_VB_Wastepacker.description: [PAWN_nameDef] wasn't the shapest tool in the shed. [PAWN_pronoun] got a job moving toxic wastepacks. While it probably shortened [PAWN_possessive] lifespan, it paid rather well.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_VB_DataSmuggler.title: data smuggler
LanguageData.UB_BTC_VB_DataSmuggler.description: On advanced worlds where stolen data can be easily detected, smugglers download data into their own brains to avoid detection. [PAWN_nameDef] was lauded for being able to carry large data packets in [PAWN_possessive] brain.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Debtor.title: thawed debtor
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Debtor.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was preserved in a cryptosleep chamber by [PAWN_possessive] glitterworld employer after contracting the Plague during deep space mining operations. When revived centuries later, [PAWN_pronoun] discovered the cure came with an inheritance of compound interest debt spanning generations, and [PAWN_pronoun] has been on the run ever since.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_TraumaIntern.title: trauma ward intern
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_TraumaIntern.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] spent nights stitching gang war victims in underground clinics and days memorizing obsolete anatomy texts. The makeshift hospitals of [PAWN_possessive] slum district taught [PAWN_objective] more than urbworld universities ever could - how to remove bullets with a vibroscalpel, cauterize wounds, and diagnose plagues from cough patterns.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_VB_ScrapArtist.title: scrap artist
LanguageData.UB_BTC_VB_ScrapArtist.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is skilled at making art from what others would call trash. Not everyone gets what [PAWN_nameDef] is trying to convey, but they can all apreciate [PAWN_possessive] skill at the craft.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Naturist.title: naturist
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Naturist.description: [PAWN_nameDef] rejected "textile oppression". Years of communal moonlit volleyball and "air baths" left [PAWN_objective] with perfect tan lines... and zero shame.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Defector01.title: mining colony defector
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Defector01.description: [PAWN_nameDef] served as an Imperial trooper stationed at a subterranean mining colony. When a rebel faction gained popularity among the oppressed miners, [PAWN_pronoun] joined their cause. After a failed uprising against Imperial overseers, [PAWN_nameDef] commandeered a supply shuttle and barely escaped the planet's atmosphere. [PAWN_pronoun] still carries the weight of those left behind in the crushed rebellion.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Overseer01.title: mining overseer
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Overseer01.description: [PAWN_nameDef] governed an Imperial subterranean mining colony for years, until worker revolts over rationing policies turned violent. When rebels breached the central vaults, [PAWN_pronoun] survived for months in maintenance tunnels using [PAWN_possessive] knowledge of the complex. Imperial forces eventually retook the colony, extracting [PAWN_objective] as part of a negotiated surrender. [PAWN_nameDef]'s administrative records remain sealed by Imperial magistrates.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Overseer02.title: refinery overseer
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Overseer02.description: [PAWN_nameDef] managed production at a steel refinery orbiting a dying red star. For years, [PAWN_pronoun] enforced output quotas across smelter platforms housing indentured workers. When a coolant system failure triggered decompression, [PAWN_nameDef] sealed [PAWN_possessive] command module and jettisoned - the only section not vented into space. [PAWN_pronoun] now bears the weight of many, many preventable deaths.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Surveyor01.title: deep space surveyor
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Surveyor01.description: [PAWN_nameDef] served aboard a survey vessel, charting mineral-rich asteroids for corporate mining. During a routine EVA near a rogue planet, [PAWN_pronoun] was struck by micrometeorites that severed [PAWN_possessive] tether. The crew declared [PAWN_objective] dead and jettisoned [PAWN_possessive] damaged stasis pod to save oxygen. Centuries later, orbital decay dropped the preserved pod.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_SleepingBeauty.title: sleeping beauty
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_SleepingBeauty.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] was a Glitterworld socialite who entered a prototype biosculptor pod for aesthetic refinement, only to become trapped during a planetary evacuation. For centuries, [PAWN_possessive] perfectly preserved form in its casket served as the sacred center of a tribal fertility cult. Tribal artisans covered the pod in gold leaf and runes until pirate slavers raided the temple. Now free but unprepared for reality, [PAWN_nameDef] expects others to handle all practical matters.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Terrorist01.title: terrorist
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Terrorist01.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was radicalized in youth and trained in urban guerrilla tactics. [PAWN_pronoun] conducted bombings and assassinations for an anti-Imperial cell before being betrayed by [PAWN_possessive] own faction.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_DemolitionsMiner.title: blastzone driller
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_DemolitionsMiner.descri: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up in a subterranean methanol distillery before becoming a mining explosives technician. After accidentally collapsing a colony sector in a single detonation spree, [PAWN_pronoun] found [PAWN_possessive] true calling as a pirate breacher specialist.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_SupplyPlanner.title: supply chain planner
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_SupplyPlanner.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] managed resource flows for a midworld industrial collective. [PAWN_pronoun] balanced production quotas against caravan shipments, becoming adept at spreadsheet logistics but developing a permanent distaste for fieldwork.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_WarMechOperator.title: war mech operator
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_WarMechOperator.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] piloted towering war machines in planetary conflicts, leveling entire city blocks with plasma cannons and railguns. Warfare on such a scale left [PAWN_possessive] nerves of steel.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_ReminiscenceHerbalist.d: [PAWN_nameDef] curated nostalgic experiences for customers using artisanal herbal infusions. Each fragrance captured precise emotional states from specific historical eras.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_ArmoryClerk.title: glitterworld armory clerk
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_ArmoryClerk.description: [PAWN_nameDef] managed weapon maintenance for a planetary defense force. [PAWN_pronoun] became adept at repairing ceremonial plasma rifles while avoiding actual target practice.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_GlitterworldSoldier02.d: [PAWN_nameDef] logged countless security shifts on glitterworld border platforms. [PAWN_pronoun] repelled occasional corporate espionage drones from a safe distance, and once disarmed a drunk trader's antique plasma pistol.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Metallurgist.title: metallurgist
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Metallurgist.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] worked twelve-hour shifts at a smelting complex, breathing furnace fumes while sorting scrap metal. [PAWN_pronoun] could judge steel quality by its ring when struck with a hammer - a skill learned from old-timers in the slag pits.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_MusicPerformer.title: music performer
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_MusicPerformer.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] played music in remote outposts to earn [PAWN_possessive] sustenance. When [PAWN_possessive] band broke up, [PAWN_pronoun] learned to survive alone on the road.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Mercenary02.title: mercenary captain
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Mercenary02.description: [PAWN_nameDef] became addicted to the "sweet symphony of war" after surviving [PAWN_possessive] first battlefield at a very young age. [PAWN_pronoun] rose to lead the Winds of Destruction - an elite mercenary unit specializing in regime change operations.\n\nDespite leading [PAWN_possessive] squad, [PAWN_pronoun] never developed interest in communicating outside missions.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Mercenary03.title: HMG contractor
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Mercenary03.description: [PAWN_nameDef] operated as a freelance heavy weapons specialist, preferring rotary cannons over diplomacy.\n\n[PAWN_pronoun] sustained [PAWN_objective] through long sieges with [PAWN_possessive] famous improvised meals.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_TaxationDissident.title: taxation dissident
dissident
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_TaxationDissident.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] once operated a thriving plantation on a frontier world, until Imperial tax collectors arrived demanding tribute for "galactic stability fees". When [PAWN_pronoun] couldn't pay the exorbitant levies, they seized [PAWN_possessive] land and executed [PAWN_possessive] couple as collateral.\n\nNow branded a debtor-criminal, [PAWN_nameDef] survives as a fugitive, [PAWN_possessive] once-sharp business mind clouded by trauma and [PAWN_possessive] hands calloused from menial labor.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_AICollapseSurvivor.desc: [PAWN_nameDef] lived on a glitterworld where "The Marketmind" AI optimized every transaction. When its predictive models failed during an unspecified event, the economy dissolved overnight.\n\n[PAWN_pronoun] survived learning to hack vending AIs for ration paste, while mistrusting any system more complex than an abacus.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_MilitaryGunner.title: military gunner
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_MilitaryGunner.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] served as a machine gunner in an midworld defense force. [PAWN_possessive] role required laying down suppressing fire rather than precision shots. [PAWN_pronoun] once cauterized [PAWN_possessive] own leg wound mid-firefight when medics couldn't reach [PAWN_objective] position.
[PAWN_nameDef] commanded rapid-response squads in the vertical battlefields of [PAWN_possessive] home urbworld. Specializing in megastructure warfare, [PAWN_pronoun] coordinated attacks across reduced space hab-zones. [PAWN_nameDef]'s signature strategy involved overloading life support systems to flush out entrenched enemies - effective, if controversial.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Horologist.title: horologist
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Horologist.description: [PAWN_possessive] hands found purpose in the intricate dance of gears and springs. Apprenticed young to a guild of master horologists, [PAWN_nameDef] learned to breathe life into antique chronometers, calibrate celestial navigation tools, and restore heirloom timepieces for wealthy offworld patrons.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_ComplianceOfficer.title: compliance officer
officer
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_ComplianceOfficer.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] worked aboard an Imperial rehabilitation barge, administering mandatory memory purges to political dissidents. [PAWN_pronoun] became adept at using ancient neurotrainers to erase specific engrams while leaving technical skills intact - until [PAWN_pronoun] discovered [PAWN_possessive] own memories had been altered thirteen times.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_SilentSurvivor.title: last unbeliever
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_ReactorEngineer.title: coreworld reactor engineer
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_ReactorEngineer.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] performed precision calibrations on coreworld power reactors. Years of routine maintenance checks and harmonic balancing gave [PAWN_objective] steady focus for electrical systems.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_UrbworldNotary.title: urbworld notary
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_UrbworldNotary.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] was responsible for authenticating and verifying biocoded contracts in the dense, corporate-dominated enclaves of an urbworld.\nIn a society where every transaction, agreement, and even personal debt was locked behind biometric security and legal bureaucracy, [PAWN_nameDef] ensured that the right people signed the right deals—or, sometimes, that certain discrepancies were quietly overlooked for the right price.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_SpacePirate01.title: space pirate
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_SpacePirate01.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] is a hardened loner who stalks the forgotten trade routes of the offworld frontier. [PAWN_pronoun] lurks along deserted highways, [PAWN_pronoun] ambushes unsuspecting caravans and settlements alike.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_WastelandCourier.title: wasteland courier
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_DanceTeacher.title: dance teacher
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_DanceTeacher.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] found purpose in the art of dance, inspiring others to find expression, freedom, and unity in rhythm.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_AntiqueDealer.title: antique dealer
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_AntiqueDealer.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] has always been captivated by relics of a bygone era. Became notorious for selling "authenticated" replicas until a disgruntled customer exposed [PAWN_possessive] forgery ring.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Banker.title: banker
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Banker.description: [PAWN_nameDef] spent years managing credit flows and wealth circulation at [PAWN_possessive] bank branch, from overseeing high-stakes corporate loans to counting deposits for small-time traders.\nA convoluted incident involving quantum ledger discrepancies funneled a VIP client's fortune into multiple encrypted accounts. Though forensic accountants found no direct fault, [PAWN_pronoun] became the convenient scapegoat for systems [PAWN_pronoun] barely understood.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Gunrunner02.title: corporate arms broker
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_DrillSergeant01.title: military instructor
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Archivist.title: archivist
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Archivist.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was in charge of the library fund at [PAWN_possessive] academy, overseeing the acquisition, preservation, and study of ancient texts and digital archives. With a sharp mind and a passion for knowledge, [PAWN_pronoun] meticulously managed the collection, often immersing in research and restoration projects.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_RemnantColonel.title: remnant colonel
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_RemnantColonel.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] was the field commander of an elite military division, trained from birth in the art of warfare. When [PAWN_possessive] faction collapsed, [PAWN_pronoun] refused to surrender, leading [PAWN_possessive] remaining forces on a bloody campaign.\n\nNow [PAWN_pronoun] serves no one but [PAWN_possessive] own uncompromising vision of order - enforced at gunpoint when necessary.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_MetroCop.title: metropolitan police
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_TankCommander.title: armored division officer
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_ExiledSoldier.title: exiled soldier
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_RadioHost.title: radio host
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Optician.title: optic fabricator
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_WaterBaron.title: water baron
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_TacticalHandler.title: K-9 tactical handler
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_ShadySalesman.title: shady salesman
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Separatist01.title: separatist leader
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Separatist02.title: wealthy separatist
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_CarHijacker.title: car hijacker
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Catachan.title: kill-team operative
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Sniper01.title: high-value target eliminator
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_NavyMidshipman.title: navy midshipman
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_NavyAdmiral01.title: navy admiral
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_NavyLordCaptain.title: navy lord captain

LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_MultipassForger.title: multipass forger

LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_MercenaryMarshal.title: mercenary marshal
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_NervousWreck.title: nervous wreck

LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_SpaceWhaler.title: space whaler
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_VaultHunter.title: vault hunter
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_ChefSlowik.title: master of appetites
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Seafarer.title: seafarer
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_DeepSeaScavenger.title: deep sea scavenger
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_DesalTech.title: desalination technician
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_BadTravelling.title: bad traveler
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_UrbworldExecutive.title: urbworld executive
executive
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Megapol01.title: megapol agent
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_Megapol02.title: megapol agent
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_ReluctantHero.title: reluctant hero
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_MidworldRanger.title: midworld ranger
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_MidworldRanger.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] was a ranger on a midworld planet, part of an irregular military force tasked with border control, hostage recovery, and anti-pirate operations. Patrols stretched for weeks through broken highways and ruined settlements, guided by flickering sensors barely holding together.
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_SatelliteEngineer.title: satellite engineer
engineer
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_VeteranRanger.title: veteran ranger
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_AbyssalScholar.title: abyssal scholar
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_ExtinctionBomber.title: extinction bomber
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_RunawayParent.title: runaway father

LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_SystemShock.title: megacorp saboteur
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_TheThing.title: polar researcher
LanguageData.UB_BTC_Adulthood_AbyssalScholar.descript: [PAWN_nameDef] maintained experimental teleportation arrays, surviving multiple "cascade events" before being reassigned to... quieter duties.
